top_signals.title: East Asian Refiners Eye Fuel Sale Boost as Hormuz Reopens
top_signals.summary: Refineries in East Asia are starting to ramp up fuel exports after months of holding back and prioritizing local sales, in what appears to be an attempt to front-run the market before flows through the Strait of Hormuz return to normal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: S. Korean Producer Prices Rise Most Since 2022 on Energy Costs
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s producer prices rose in May at the fastest pace in nearly four years, as higher energy costs and a broad-based increase in industrial prices continued to filter through the economy.

top_signals.title: Ryusuke Hamaguchi wants to make the impossible possible
top_signals.summary: An ethos of idealism is pervasive in the director's first French-language film, which came with the challenge and exhilaration of shooting in Paris.
